title: Proclamation No. 507, s. 1965
text:
PROCLAMATION NO. 507

RESERVING FOR ROAD RIGHT-OF-WAY PURPOSES A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PRIVATE DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE CITY OF CALOOCAN

By virtue of the powers vested in me by law, I, DIOSDADO MACAPAGAL, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale or other disposition and reserve for road right-of-way purposes under the administration of the Commissioner of Public Highways, subject to private rights, if any there be, and to the condition that the Bureau of Public Highways shall negotiate with the occupants with a view to reimbursing them of the value of their improvements thereon, a certain parcel of land of the private domain situated in the City of Caloocan, and more particularly described as follows, to wit:

Lot 76, (LRC) Pcs-1828

“A parcel of land (Lot 76 of the consolidation-subdivision plan (LRC) Pcs-1828, being a portion of the consolidation of Lots, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 & 7, all described on plan Psd-21154, LRC (GLRO) Record No. 4429) situated in the Barrio of Baesa, Municipality of Caloocan, Province of Rizal, Island of Luzon. Bounded on the E., points 2 to 3, by Lot 7; points 3 to 4, by Lot 46; points 4 to 5, by Lot 3; points 5 to 6, by Lot 61; points 6 to 7, Lot 13; points 7 to 8, by Lot 14; points 8 to 9, by Lot 15; points 9 to 10, by Lot 63; points 10 to 11, by Lot 65; points 11 to 12, by Lot 19; points 12 to 13; by Lot 24; points 13 to 14, by Lot 23; points 14 to 15, by Lot 32; points 15 to 16, by Lot 68; points 16 to 17 by Lot 67; points 17 to 18, by Lot 69; points 18 to 19, by Lot 37; points 19 to 20, by Lot 71; points 20 to 21, by Lot 48; points 21 to 22, by Lot 47; and points 22 to 23, by Lot 45; all of the consolidation-subdivision plan; on the SE., and SW., points 23 to 26, by Calle Repare (8.00 m. wide); on the W., points 26 to 27; by Lot 44; points 27 to 28; by Lot 41; points 28 to 29, by Lot 71; points 29 to 30, by Lot 38; points 30 to 31, by Lot 36; points 31 to 32, by Lot 28; points 32 to 33, by Lot 31; points 33 to 34, by Lot 66; points 34 to 35, by Lot 25, by Lot 25; points 35 to 36, by Lot 18; points 36 to 37; by Lot 62; points 37 to 38, by Lot 64; points 38 to 39, by Lot 10; and points 39 to 40, by Lot 8, all of the consolidation-subdivision plan; and on the NW., points 40 to 1 and 1 to 2, by Lot 77 of the consolidation-subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 61 deg. 49′ W., 381.49 m. from B.M. 9, Piedad Estate:

thence N. 35 deg. 47 E., 21.67 m to point 2″ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 105.12 m to point 3″ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 22.55 m to point 4″ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 100.08 m to point 5″ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 37.94 m to point 6″ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 51.82 m to point 7″ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 28.19 m to point 8″ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 39.02 m to point 9″ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 73.23 m to point 10′ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 92.55 m to point 11′ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 82.73 m to point 12′ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 20.09 m to point 13′ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 62.99 m to point 14″ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 34.64 m to point 15″ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 152.72 m to point 16″ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 116.05 m to point 17″ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 66.33 m to point 18″ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 25.72 m to point 19″ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 33.34 m to point 20″ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 55.61 m to point 21′ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 105.00 m to point 22′ thence S. 0 deg. 55 W., 227.65 m to point 23″ thence S. 21 deg. 55 W., 32.95 m to point 24′ thence N. 45 deg. 51 W., 31.62 m. to point 25″ thence N. 43 deg. 12 W., 36.12 m. to point 26″ thence N. 0 deg. 55 E., 208.75 m. to point 27″ thence N. 0 deg. 55 E., 82.97 m. to point 28″ thence N. 0 deg. 55 E., 23.90 m. to point 29″ thence N. 0 deg. 55 E., 122.27 m. to point 30″ thence N. 0 deg. 55 E., 113.54 m. to point 31″ thence N. 0 deg. 55 E., 99.43 m. to point 32″ thence N. 0 deg. 55 E., 192.66 m. to point 33″ thence N. 0 deg. 55 E., 47.57 m. to point 34″ thence N. 0 deg. 55 E., 74.47 m. to point 35″ thence N. 0 deg. 55 E., 106.05 m. to point 36″ thence N. 0 deg. 55 E., 92.61 m. to point 37″ thence N. 0 deg. 55 E., 36.09 m. to point 38″ thence N. 0 deg. 55 E., 140.10 m. to point 39″ thence N. 0 deg. 55 E., 157.05 m. to point 40″ thence N. 86 deg. 55 E., 47.72 m. to the point of

beginning; containing an area of NINETY ONE THOUSAND FOUR HUNDRED AND NINETY (91,490) SQUARE METERS, more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground as follows: point 24 & 25, by Old Points, and the rest by B. L. Cyl. Conc. Mons; 15 x 60 cm.; bearings true; declination 0 deg. 45′ E., dated of the Original Survey, September 8-27, October 4-21 and November 17-18, 1911, and that of the Consolidation-subdivision survey, December 8-23, 1961.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and cause the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

DONE in the City of Manila, this 15th day of December, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty-five.

Source: CDAsia
